collision_guidance: Use collider only on the solid tower body and base. Magnetic radius is separate gameplay logic, not collision.
No collision. Pure overlay VFX aligned to the magnet tower emitter center.
Collider only on the machine body. Wind zone is separate gameplay logic.
No collision. Repeat or stretch inside wind zones.
Collider on the machine frame body. Damage only on the descending press head and crush lane.
Collider only on visible bridge body and top walkable surface. Do not use transparent frame area.
Pillar colliders always active. Beam collider only active when the beam is visually on, and it should be narrow.
Damage/collision follows the visible arm and tip. Keep pivot fixed. Do not use the full frame rectangle.
Collision should use the hammer head and optionally chain/rod, not the transparent frame.
Landing and collision should use the visible deck only. Delivery zone should match the visible safe area you place on top.
